2192100.name: Lantern Light (DEMO)
2192100.description:
Lantern Light is a first-person action horror puzzle game where you explore a decrepit manor and face twisted monsters. While clinging to your axe and the fragile glow of your lantern, the only thing keeping you from madness. Utilize the light from your lantern to blind enemies and the oil inside to burn away corrupted vines blocking your path. Break down wooden boards and cut down enemies with your axe. Lastly use light pedestals and mirrors to reflect light beams to burn away corrupted vines you can't reach yourself. Keep the light alive, preserve your sanity, and confront your deepest fears in Lantern Light.

This game was made as a Senior Capstone project for RPI's Games and Simulation Arts and Sciences program.
2192100.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
